---
title: "Module 3: Data Wrangling with pandas"
toc: true
toc-location: left
---

Hands-on walkthrough of common data cleaning and transformation patterns.

## Reading and Inspecting Data

```python
import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv("data.csv")
df.head()
df.info()
df.describe()
```

## Filtering and Aggregating

```python
result = (
    df[df["year"] == 2024]
    .groupby("category")["revenue"]
    .sum()
    .reset_index()
    .sort_values("revenue", ascending=False)
)
```

## Handling Missing Values

```python
# Check
df.isnull().sum()

# Drop or fill
df.dropna(subset=["critical_column"])
df["optional_col"].fillna(0)
```
